title: No 'next alarm in X' display on alarm list
description: The alarm list shows individual alarm times but no summary of when the next alarm will fire (e.g., 'Next alarm in 6h 30m'). Users with multiple alarms must mentally calculate.

PM.notes: Nice-to-have. The watch face complication already shows countdown.

Dev Lead.notes: Needs time computation logic in composable, not a quick fix.
